title: R effective
script_summary: An exploration of R effective reveals the science behind its significance in understanding disease spread.

segments.voiceover: Science knows more about R effective than social media lets on.
R effective, or R0, measures how contagious a disease is. But what does that really mean?
For instance, if R effective is 2, one infected person spreads it to two others. But there's more.
Factors like immunity, transmission methods, and interventions can shift this number.
Understanding R effective empowers us to manage outbreaks better and make informed choices.
Want to learn more about the science behind health? Hit subscribe and stay curious!
